posts.text: Good morning USAAAAAAA! Peace to the planet it’s Tuesday & @robinthicke and @DiRealShaggy is pulling up today! So tap live breakfastclubonline.com/list…

🗣️🎙️ @ripmicheals will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting his upcoming comedy show 'April Fools Comedy Jam' going down April 4th at the Barclays Center in Brooklyn!  

Listen live on The Breakfast Club and set your alarms ⏰➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🗣️🎙️ @robinthicke and @DiRealShaggy will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting their new song 'Looking Lovely' out now!

Listen live on The Breakfast Club and set your alarms ⏰➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🫏 Donkey of the Day goes to Rebel Wilson’s PR team for leaked audio allegedly plotting to create an online smear campaign targeting *The Deb* producer Amanda Ghost. 🤔 Do we realize how frequently this is occurring??? Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

🚨 Thanks to @queenafua for gifting us our own 21-day detox fast! Who else wants to try to detox their lives 👀. To learn more check out the full conversation on @netflix !

Video

🚨 Last night, the 2026 Oscar Awards went down, and The Breakfast Club weighs in on last night’s wins and losses. We took to the phone lines to check the temperature in the room .🏆
Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix!

Video

🚨 @queenafua  came through to promote her 21-day detox, but what are some ways  can you maintain the benefits of your detox? “Words are medicine.” ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🏆 Last night were the 2026 Oscar Awards, and there were a lot of big wins! Ryan Coogler and Michael B. Jordan took home their first Oscars, and Teyana Taylor celebrated everyone who won, even after losing the Best Supporting Actress category. Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa.

Video

🚨Jordan’s book “Choreplay: The Marriage-Saving Magic of Getting Your Head Out of Your Ass” touches on the idea that some men truly only like the pum pum but not the woman herself enough to help. Before you decide that relationships aren’t for you, have you tried flipping the dynamics in your household to help save your relationship?  ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix

Video

🚨 Uber is catching heat for discrimination after introducing a gender-based “women-only” ride feature for drivers and riders. Is it discrimination or discernment? Check out the full @breakfastclubam conversation on @netflix.

Video

🚨 @jordancarlos  came through to promote his new book 📕 “Choreplay: The Marriage-Saving Magic of Getting Your Head Out of Your Ass”! Jordan breaks down how 'Choreplay' saved his marriage! ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🗣️ 🎙️ @jordancarlos  will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting his new book ’Choreplay: The Marriage-Saving Magic of Getting Your Head Out of Your Ass’ ! The Guy Code is back together for this interview Listen live on The Breakfast Club and Set your alarms ⏰ ➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🚨 Reports are swirling that @janetjackson and Jermaine Jackson are clashing after she saw the Michael biopic 👀🎬, and @lorenlorosa has the latest on the Jackson family’s business. 🎤👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Video

Rev. Pastor Jamal Bryant calls to end the Target 🎯 boycott after claims that the CEO has begun making effective changes and upholding 3 out of 4 demands. Local organizers in Minneapolis disagree and feel that the diversity and inclusion demands haven’t been met. Listen to Front Page News with @mimibrowntv.

Video

🔊 Donkey of the Day goes to a woman who delivered a lasagna laced with oxycodone, intending to harm her pregnant family member, which caused a miscarriage. Sometimes… it really be your own people! Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC

Video

🚨 Hey Cousins! This just in! @blackeffect Podcast Festival will have @thecarlosking_  (@realitywiththeking), @luvcrystalrenee 's Keep It Positive Sweetie, and @noreaga  & @djEFN ’s @drinkchamps in the building 🥳🎉

Grab your tickets as they go on sale at 12 PM aka in 30 minutes 🙌! Make sure you pull up to the family reunion on Saturday, April 25 at Pullman Yards. Cousins, tap in RN 🎫

Video

🚨 What birthed the new identity of @angelasimmons as “Angela Renee,” and how open is she to love after the split from Yo Gotti? “I just want what’s for me.”➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix

Video

🔔 Some music that may have been on Drake’s upcoming album Iceman was released and takes shots at Kendrick Lamar and Serena Williams… 👀 @lorenlorosa dives into the latest OVO news. Tap in 🔊

Video

🚨 @AngelaSimmons , aka Angela Renee, is stepping into the music scene with a spoken word record featuring Jadakiss that will be out this Friday — but what made her want to enter the space now? 🎤➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🗣️ 🎙️ @AngelaSimmons aka Angela Renee will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting her upcoming single 'Run To’ out on Friday! Listen live on The Breakfast Club and Set your alarms ⏰ ➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…
